queries.query: Why does iron stop stars from burning?
steps: T5: Each element = specific D_nuclear crystallisation.
T2: F_nuclear = BE / BE_max (Fe-56 = maximum binding energy per nucleon = 8.795 MeV).
F_nuclear(U)  = 0.8631 = much lower (radioactive, decays toward higher F).
Stars fuse elements along increasing F_nuclear. At Fe: ΔF_fusion < 0.
T2 Law 2: systems move toward higher F. Fusion beyond Fe does NOT increase F.
Therefore: stellar burning stops at Fe. Iron is the stellar Freedom minimum.
queries.result: Fe F_nuclear=0.9994 is local maximum. Stars stop here.
queries.label: SIMULATED. F=P/D HYPOTHESIS UNDER TEST.
